name: Crystal Ball of Mind Reading
entries: While touching this crystal orb, you can cast {@spell Scrying|XPHB} (save {@dc 17}) with it. In addition, you can cast {@spell Detect Thoughts|XPHB} (save {@dc 17}) targeting creatures you can see within 30 feet of the spell's sensor. You don't need to concentrate on this {@spell Detect Thoughts|XPHB} spell to maintain it during its duration, but it ends if the {@spell Scrying|XPHB} spell ends.
